<!-- 感谢你为 osu!web 贡献代码！请先阅读 贡献指南：./CONTRIBUTING.md -->
<!-- Thank you for contributing to osu!web! Please read the contributing guide: ./CONTRIBUTING.md -->

## 变更说明 / Description

<!-- 简要描述本 PR 做了什么、为什么做。如有相关讨论请附链接。 -->
<!-- Briefly describe what this PR does and why. Link any related discussions. -->

## 变更类型 / Type of Change

<!-- 请勾选适用项 / Please check all that apply -->

- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] ♻️ 重构 / Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] 📚 文档 / Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] 🎨 样式 / Styling (`style`)
- [ ] 🧪 测试 / Test (`test`)
- [ ] 🔧 杂项（构建 / 依赖 / 配置）/ Chore (build / deps / config) (`chore`)

## 相关 Issue / Related Issue

<!-- 例如：Closes #123。如无关联可填 N/A -->
<!-- e.g., Closes #123. Use N/A if none -->

## 自检清单 / Self-Check

<!-- 请确认以下各项均已完成 -->
<!-- Please confirm the following before requesting review -->

- [ ] 代码通过 `pnpm check`（TypeScript 类型检查）/ Code passes `pnpm check`
- [ ] 代码通过 `pnpm lint`（ESLint）/ Code passes `pnpm lint`
- [ ] 项目通过 `pnpm build`（构建无报错）/ Project builds successfully via `pnpm build`
- [ ] 未提交任何版权内容（谱面 / 音乐 / 皮肤 / 受版权保护的图片）/ No copyrighted content (beatmaps / music / skins / copyrighted images) committed
- [ ] 提交信息符合 Conventional Commits 规范（feat/fix/docs/style/refactor/test/chore）/ Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

## 截图 / 录屏（可选）/ Screenshots / Recordings (optional)

<!-- 如为 UI 变更，请附上截图或录屏（修改前 / 修改后）。可直接拖拽到此处。 -->
<!-- For UI changes, attach screenshots or recordings (before / after). You can drag and drop them here. -->
